title: dondia
intro: Dondia is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical Africa and India, commonly known as "Indian trumpet vine." The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of dondia include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as supporting respiratory health and immune function. Dondia can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional medicine to make tonics and ointments.
